mapper.select:
select u.user_id, u.user_name, u.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.ancestors as dept_ancestors, ifnull(c.contract_count, 0) as contract_count, ifnull(c.contract_amount, 0) as contract_amount, ifnull(c.loaned_count, 0) as loaned_count, ifnull(c.loaned_amount, 0) as loaned_amount, ifnull(c.fee_income, 0) as fee_income, ifnull(w.call_count, 0) as call_count, ifnull(w.valid_call_count, 0) as valid_call_count, ifnull(w.intent_customer_count, 0) as intent_customer_count, ifnull(w.visit_count, 0) as visit_count, ifnull(w.signed_count, 0) as signed_count from sys_user u left join sys_dept d on u.dept_id = d.dept_id left join ( select c.user_id, count(1) as contract_count, sum(ifnull(c.contract_amount, 0)) as contract_amount, sum(case when c.status = 'LOANED' then 1 else 0 end) as loaned_count, sum(case when c.status = 'LOANED' then ifnull(c.disburse_amount, 0) else 0 end) as loaned_amount, sum(ifnull(c.first_fee_paid, 0) + ifnull(c.second_fee_paid, 0)) as fee_income from loan_contract c where c.sign_time is not null and date(c.sign_time) >= date(#{beginDate}) and date(c.sign_time) <= date(#{endDate}) group by c.user_id ) c on c.user_id = u.user_id left join ( select l.user_id, sum(ifnull(l.call_count, 0)) as call_count, sum(ifnull(l.valid_call_count, 0)) as valid_call_count, sum(ifnull(l.intent_customer_count, 0)) as intent_customer_count, sum(ifnull(l.visit_count, 0)) as visit_count, sum(ifnull(l.signed_count, 0)) as signed_count from loan_work_log l where l.work_date >= date(#{beginDate}) and l.work_date <= date(#{endDate}) group by l.user_id ) w on w.user_id = u.user_id
(c.user_id is not null or w.user_id is not null)
and u.user_id = #{userId}
and u.user_name like concat('%', #{userName}, '%')
and (u.dept_id = #{deptId} or u.dept_id in ( select dept_id from sys_dept where find_in_set(#{deptId}, ancestors) ))
${params.dataScope}
order by ifnull(c.loaned_amount, 0) desc, ifnull(c.contract_amount, 0) desc
